---
title: Hybrid Maize Breeding in Nepal
author: Deependra Dhakal
date: '2018-07-23'
slug: hybrid-maize-breeding-in-nepal
categories:
  - Plant Breeding
tags: ["rmarkdown", "research-review", "maize"]
---

Seeds are the carrier of technology -- this statement, I often mull over and now enshrine, while we are getting into the talks about seeds of change.
